# start

**Instance Property**

The minimum distance in eye coordinates before fog is applied to the fragment color.

## Declaration

```swift
var start: GLfloat { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property is ignored when the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKEffectPropertyFog/mode] property is set to [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKFogMode/exp] or [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKFogMode/exp2].

## Fog Properties

- **color**: The color of the fog at maximum density.
- **density**: The rate at which the fog exponent increases.
- **end**: The distance in eye coordinates where fog completely covers the color fragment.
